headline: Kraft Heinz vs. McCormick vs. Hormel: Which Struggling Food Giant Is Worth Buying?
summary: Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC), McCormick (NYSE:MKC), and Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL) have all reported recent earnings into the same brutal consumer backdrop: University of Michigan sentiment sitting at 56.4, deep in recessionary territory. Three iconic food portfolios. Three different turnaround stories. One question worth answering. Turnarounds Look Very Different Across These Three Kraft Heinz is the most ...
